tool.name: aoptk normalize chemicals

configfiles.configfile:
import os import sys
import pandas as pd import yaml from aoptk.chemical import Chemical from aoptk.text_generation_api import TextGenerationAPI from aoptk.normalization.pubchem_api import PubChemAPI from aoptk.normalization.mesh_terms import MeshTerms from aoptk.normalization.provide_mesh_term_dataframe_from_xml import ProvideMeshTermDataframeFromXML
#if $normalization_method.method == "llm" @MODEL_SETUP@
chemicals = pd.read_csv("$input_file", sep="\t") col_name = chemicals.columns[int("$column_name") - 1] chemical_list = pd.read_csv("$chemical_list", sep="\t") chemical_col_name = chemicals.columns[int("$chemical_list_column_name") - 1] chemical_list = chemical_list[chemical_col_name].tolist()
chemicals[col_name] = chemicals[col_name].apply( lambda x: TextGenerationAPI(model=model, api_key=litellm_api_key, url=litellm_base_url).normalize_chemical(chemical=Chemical(x), chemical_list=[Chemical(chem) for chem in chemical_list]) )
#elif $normalization_method.method == "pubchem" chemicals = pd.read_csv("$input_file", sep="\t") col_name = chemicals.columns[int("$column_name") - 1] chemicals[col_name] = chemicals[col_name].apply( lambda x: PubChemAPI().normalize_chemical(Chemical(x)) if pd.notna(x) else x )
#elif $normalization_method.method == "mesh" chemicals = pd.read_csv("$input_file", sep="\t") col_name = chemicals.columns[int("$column_name") - 1] mesh_terms_df = ProvideMeshTermDataframeFromXML(database_path="$input_xml").provide_normalization_dataframe() chemicals[col_name] = chemicals[col_name].apply( lambda x: MeshTerms(mesh_terms=mesh_terms_df).normalize_chemical(Chemical(x)) )
#else raise ValueError("Select a valid normalization method.") #end if
chemicals["heading"] = chemicals[col_name].apply(lambda chem: chem.heading) chemicals.to_csv("normalized_chemicals.tsv", sep="\t", index=False)

param.name: input_file
param.label: TSV with chemical column.
param.help: Input tsv file with chemical column.

param.name: column_name
param.label: Column to normalize.
param.help: Select the column from the input table to normalize.

param.name: input_file
param.label: TSV with chemical column.
param.help: Input tsv file with chemical column.

param.name: column_name
param.label: Column to normalize.
param.help: Select the column from the input table to normalize.

param.name: chemical_list
param.label: TSV with chemical list.
param.help: Input tsv file with chemical list.

param.name: chemical_list_column_name
param.label: Column with chemicals used for the normalization.
param.help: Select the column from the chemical list table to use for normalization.

param.name: input_file
param.label: TSV with chemical column.
param.help: Input tsv file with chemical column.

param.name: input_xml
param.label: XML database with MeSH terms.
param.help: Input xml file with MeSH terms.

param.name: column_name
param.label: Column to normalize.
param.help: Select the column from the input table to normalize.

tool.help:
Chemical Normalization ======================
Set of tools to normalize chemical entities using different methods: LLMs, PubChem synonyms, or MeSH terms.
For normalization via MeSH Terms, the XML database of terms can be obtained here: https://www.nlm.nih.gov/databases/download/mesh.html
